compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect Confluence integration
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Targeted updates to existing project documentation to keep it accurate after the Confluence integration ships.
**Why**: CLAUDE.md, dso-config.conf, and KNOWN-ISSUES.md will become stale once confluence-fetch.sh, dso:confluence-researcher, and ref-library-loader.sh exist. Future agents need accurate awareness of the new infrastructure and its known limitations.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md architecture section — brief entries for confluence-fetch.sh, dso:confluence-researcher, and ref-library-loader.sh with their roles and locations
- IN: .claude/dso-config.conf — comment block documenting all new confluence.* config keys (confluence.base_url, confluence.max_results, confluence.roadmap_research_enabled, confluence.reference.url, confluence.reference.tags)
- IN: KNOWN-ISSUES.md — note the /tmp access limitation on hardened CI runners and the sub-agent nesting limitation for brainstorm contexts
- OUT: New documentation files; CLAUDE.md sections unrelated to the Confluence integration

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md architecture section includes entries for confluence-fetch.sh, dso:confluence-researcher, and ref-library-loader.sh describing their roles
  ← Satisfies: Approach section — shared infrastructure documentation requirement
- When this story is complete, .claude/dso-config.conf contains a comment block that documents each new confluence.* config key with its type, default, and purpose
  ← Satisfies: SC 4 — reference URL list "configurable in dso-config.conf with per-URL topic tags"
- When this story is complete, KNOWN-ISSUES.md includes entries for the /tmp write access limitation on hardened CI runners and the sub-agent nesting limitation (researcher dispatch skipped when brainstorm is a sub-agent)
  ← Satisfies: Scenario Analysis items — deployment limitation documentation

## Considerations

- Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting, structure, and conventions

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Claude

comments.body: Consideration: [Completeness] CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md — CLAUDE.md references plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md as the authoritative config key registry. Story F must update this file (not just dso-config.conf's comment block) with all new confluence.* keys, their types, defaults, and absence behavior. Operators consulting CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md will otherwise see an incomplete picture of the available configuration surface. Add to done definitions: 'When this story is complete, plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md includes entries for all new confluence.* config keys introduced by this epic.' (taxonomy: consumer_impact)
comments.author: Claude
